entity.title: Lumina Fine Jewelry
entity.heroSubtitle: Fine Jewelry Crafted with Passion Since 2001

heroDescription.processed: Discover exquisite jewelry that captures light and imagination. Each Lumina piece is a testament to artistry, quality, and the enduring beauty of precious materials, handcrafted by master artisans in our New York atelier.

ctaDescription.processed: From engagement rings to statement necklaces, explore our collections and discover jewelry that speaks to your unique style. Schedule a private consultation for a personalized experience.
ctaDescription.summary: From engagement rings to statement necklaces, explore our collections and discover jewelry that speaks to your unique style. Schedule a private consultation for a personalized experience.

body.processed:
Inspired by the delicate beauty of nature in bloom, the Eternal Garden collection features intricate floral motifs rendered in 18k gold with precious gemstone accents. Each piece captures the ephemeral beauty of a garden in perpetual spring.

From hand-carved rose gold petals to vine-wrapped bands set with emeralds and sapphires, this collection celebrates the organic artistry found in nature's finest details.

image.alt: Delicate gold jewelry with floral design

body.processed:
The Midnight Sky collection draws inspiration from the celestial heavens. Sapphires and diamonds are set in platinum to evoke the twinkling beauty of a starlit night. Bold yet elegant, these pieces command attention at any formal occasion.

Star motifs, crescent moons, and constellation patterns create a sense of wonder and mystique that is uniquely Lumina.

body.processed:
Warm tones and fluid lines define the Golden Hour collection. Featuring yellow gold and citrine, these pieces capture the magic of sunset light. Perfect for everyday elegance with a touch of glamour.

This year-round collection includes stackable rings, layering necklaces, and statement earrings designed to mix and match for effortless style.

body.processed:
A third-generation jewelry artisan, Isabella brings decades of family tradition to every piece she creates. Trained at the prestigious Scuola Orafa in Florence, Italy, her work blends classical European techniques with contemporary design sensibilities. She specializes in hand-engraving and filigree work that gives each piece an irreplaceable human touch.

Isabella's filigree work has been featured in Vogue Italia and the International Jewelry Exhibition in Basel.
body.summary: A third-generation jewelry artisan, Isabella brings decades of family tradition to every piece she creates. Trained at the prestigious Scuola Orafa in Florence, Italy, her work blends classical Europe

body.processed:
James is our lead stone setter, known for his precision and attention to detail. With a background in mechanical engineering and gemology from GIA, he brings a scientific approach to the art of stone setting, ensuring every gem is securely and beautifully placed.

His micro-pave work is renowned in the industry for its flawless execution, with settings so precise they appear to float on the metal surface.
body.summary: James is our lead stone setter, known for his precision and attention to detail. With a background in mechanical engineering and gemology from GIA, he brings a scientific approach to the art of stone

body.processed:
Amara is our creative director and lead designer, whose bold vision has shaped Lumina's most iconic collections. Drawing inspiration from architecture, nature, and West African art traditions, she creates designs that are both modern and timeless.

Before founding Lumina's design studio, Amara studied at the Royal College of Art in London and apprenticed with acclaimed jeweler David Yurman.
body.summary: Amara is our creative director and lead designer, whose bold vision has shaped Lumina's most iconic collections. Drawing inspiration from architecture, nature, and West African art traditions, she cre

body.processed:
Founded in 2001, Lumina Fine Jewelry began with a simple belief: that exceptional jewelry should celebrate true craftsmanship above all else. Our New York atelier brings together master artisans from around the world, each contributing their unique expertise to create pieces of enduring beauty.

Our Philosophy

We believe that fine jewelry is more than adornment. It marks life's most precious moments, carries stories across generations, and celebrates the artistry of human hands working with nature's most beautiful materials.

Sustainability

Every Lumina piece is crafted with responsibility. We use only recycled precious metals, conflict-free diamonds, and ethically sourced gemstones. All our diamonds are independently certified by the Gemological Institute of America.
